Log:

@@ -90,7 +90,7 @@ LICENSE_FILE=	${WRKSRC}/COPYING
 
 LATEST_LINK=	squid31
 
-SQUID_STABLE_VER=	20
+SQUID_STABLE_VER=	21
 
 CONFLICTS_INSTALL=	squid-2.[0-9].* squid-3.[^1].* cacheboy-[0-9]* lusca-head-[0-9]*
 GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
